executives.name: Charlene Begley
executives.background: Ms. Begley served in various capacities at General Electric Company from 1988 to 2013, including as a Senior Vice President and Chief Information Officer. She currently serves on the boards of Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. and Nasdaq, Inc.

executives.name: Jon Huntsman, Jr.
executives.background: Former U.S. Ambassador to Russia, China, and Singapore. Director since 2020.

executives.name: Madeleine Kleiner
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and General Counsel of Hilton Hotels Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary
